title: TexTrue's Embeddium Options
description: Unofficial port of Reese's Sodium Options to work with Embeddium on MinecraftForge/NeoForge. Alternative Options Menu for Embeddium.
body: > **Embeddium has merged RSO 1.20.1 and above**, which means that you don't need to install TEO to use the similar video options screen. (See: [ThinkingStudios/textrues-embeddium-options#9](https://github.com/ThinkingStudios/textrues-embeddium-options/issues/9)) # TexTrue's Embeddium Options ### ~~**_If you are using [Rubidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium), you should go with [TexTrue's Rubidium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/textrues-rubidium-options)!_**~~ Unofficial port of [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) to work with Embeddium on MinecraftForge/NeoForge. TEO's icon by [KrLite](https://github.com/KrLite) Replaces [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)'s Options Screen with intention of improving UX ## Features - Search Bar. - Slider values can be changed while holding down `SHIFT` key and scrolling. - Scrollable Tabs - Scrollable Pages (Overall better UX when using with Embeddium Extra). ## Requirements - [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) ### _**Don't report TEO's issues to the official Reese's Sodium Options & TRO Github.**_
